timeline.headline: Netflix told by court to refund customers over repeated price hikes
timeline.summary: Netflix may have to repay Italian subscribers after a court ruled against years of price increases. Customers could see hundreds of euros in refunds, but an appeal will decide if those payouts actually happen.

timeline.headline: Netflix Lost the Battle for Warner Bros, but Goldman Sachs Says It Won the War
timeline.summary: As Netflix exits the Warner Bros. acquisition deal, Goldman Sachs analyst sees it as a smart move, projecting solid upside ahead and backing NFLX stock as a “Buy” now.

timeline.headline: Netflix price increases expected to lift full-year guidance: Jefferies
timeline.summary: Netflix Inc (NASDAQ:NFLX, XETRA:NFC) is heading into its first quarter 2026 earnings report amid a mix of improving financial expectations and lingering investor concerns, according to a recent note from Jefferies analysts. The firm reiterated its ‘Buy’ rating and $134 price target, implying...

timeline.headline: Netflix (NFLX) Slid as Results Fell Short of Expectations
timeline.summary: Harding Loevner, an asset management company, released its “Global Equity Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. For most of the past 15 years, US equities not only outperformed but created a perception of inevitability around their outperformance. This phenomenon, termed “US exceptionalism,” highlighted exceptional earnings growth, valuations, and […]

timeline.headline: Where Nvidia Stock Needs to Trade to Get Out of Its Sideways Trap
timeline.summary: Nvidia stock is having a good day, but it’s still stuck in the purgatory of a nine-month trading range. Nvidia stock was up 2% on Wednesday, after gaining 0.3% on Tuesday; the has risen 2.5%, and the has advanced 2.7%. The stock was down throughout the day on Tuesday after reports that the U.S. had attacked military targets on Kharg Island, from which much of Iran’s oil is exported.

timeline.headline: Tesla Stock Jumps Despite Slumping Oil Prices. Why It’s Getting an Iran Bump.
timeline.summary: Tesla has benefited from higher oil prices in the past, so it might seem odd that crude is down sharply and the electric-vehicle maker’s stock is up. Shares of the Elon Musk-led company were up more than 4% in premarket trading and gained 2.6% in early trading to $355.57, while the and were up 2.6% and 2.9%, respectively. Benchmark oil prices were down more 16% in early trading, below $92 a barrel.

timeline.summary: Elon Musk's biographer Walter Isaacson says the Tesla billionaire goes "demon mode" over Sam Altman. Polymarket gives Musk just a 39% chance of winning his lawsuit against Altman.

timeline.headline: Intel Stock Surges 2% As Elon Musk Partnership Targets 1 Terawatt Of AI Power
timeline.summary: Intel (INTC) shares climbed Tuesday after joining the "Terafab" project with Tesla and SpaceX. Discover how this 1-terawatt AI partnership is driving Intel stock toward a $70 target.

timeline.headline: Intel Posts On X "Intel is proud to join the Terafab project with @SpaceX, @xAI, and @Tesla to help refactor silicon fab technology. Our ability to design, fabricate, and package ultra-high-performance chips at scale will help accelerate Terafab's aim to produce 1 TW/year of compute to power future advances in AI and robotics. It was fun hosting @elonmusk at Intel this past weekend!"
